anti_pattern_violations.evidence: File starts with '# /validate-epic-coverage' instead of YAML frontmatter block
anti_pattern_violations.rule_reference: coding-standards.md: Commands must have YAML frontmatter
anti_pattern_violations.remediation:
Add YAML frontmatter to file start:
---
description: Validate epic coverage and report gaps
argument-hint: "[EPIC-ID | --help]"
allowed-tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash, AskUserQuestion
---

anti_pattern_violations.evidence: Lines contain narrative explanation instead of direct instructions
anti_pattern_violations.rule_reference: coding-standards.md: Direct instructions, not narrative prose
anti_pattern_violations.remediation: Replace narrative 'How It Works' section with concise phase descriptions

blocking_violations.description: Missing YAML frontmatter in command file

remediation_sequence.name: Fix Structure Violations
remediation_sequence.action: Add YAML frontmatter with description, argument-hint, allowed-tools
